steps.title: Identify what the question needs
steps.content: A 149% increase means the new value equals the original plus 149% of it: new = x + 1.49x = 2.49x. The answer is whichever choice equals 2.49x.

steps.title: Eliminate the choices
steps.content:
• Choice A — $5.10x$: this would make the increase $4.10x$, or 410% of the original, not 149%. ✗
  • Choice B — $0.51x$: smaller than x, so it represents a decrease, not an increase. ✗
  • Choice C — $1.49x$: represents only a 49% increase ($1.49x - x = 0.49x$). ✗
  • Choice D — $2.49x$: $2.49x - x = 1.49x$, which is exactly 149% of x. ✓
D is correct.
